meaning: vt.灌溉,修水利,冲洗伤口,使潮湿vi.进行灌溉
examples: He wants to use the water to irrigate barren desert land.
The lines were thought to have been a system of canals that had been built to irrigate the surface.
None of the water from Lake Powell is used to irrigate the area.
It's the first time that Howell has had to irrigate in the 40 years running the farm.
Big dams power the flashing neon lights of Las Vegas and irrigate golf courses in the Arizona desert.
